note: 자(Ruler) 여의봉 내려치기 리워크 2종: 거대 자 본체(single, 9:16 세로), 착지 충격파 이펙트(strip 6, fx_ 접두사=원샷 12fps 등록).

jobs.prompt: Single pixel art in-game weapon sprite: a tall vertical yellow wooden ruler/measuring stick standing upright, filling the full height, with tick marks only (ABSOLUTELY no numbers, no letters, no digits), a rounded cap at the bottom end, single object, no hands, no character, no drop shadow on the background.

Pixel art effect animation sprite strip: a 1x6 horizontal sprite strip (6 equal columns, one effect centered per column, generous empty magenta space around each), hard-edged opaque pixel clusters (no soft glow/blur), a ground-impact shockwave sequence: (1) bright central impact flash, (2) white starburst spikes, (3) expanding brown dust shockwave ring, (4) ring wider + debris, (5) ring dissolving, (6) faint residual dust settling.
